# Webapp Testing

## Summary

Use this skill when you need a lightweight browser-oriented QA pass for a generated web app.

## Steps

1. Open the page in a desktop viewport and check initial render, scroll behavior, and missing assets.
2. Repeat the same check in a narrow mobile viewport and confirm touch target sizes.
3. Record any obvious layout, console, or loading issues before deeper debugging.
